work_unit: engine:nesting-guard — opt-worktree.sh 加 standing-wt-from-standing-wt 嵌套根治守卫
situation: scout-scan 全 8 项目 health=0.0（[[scout-all-zero-pick-dirty-signal]] case-391 全零态），#1 1BfrYW9R 推荐润色/跳过（真饱和 38 pass 勿堆润色）。下移找 dirty 信号：state NEXT_SUGGESTION 指向 case-400/401 遗留结构性大项——standing-wt-from-standing-wt 嵌套根治。根因：opt-worktree.sh 顶部 PROJECT=$(cd . && pwd) 后 WT_BASE=$PROJECT/../.opt-worktrees/$(basename $PROJECT)；当引擎从 standing optimization worktree 内（cwd=.../.opt-worktrees/autonomous-studio/optimization）跑本脚本时，PROJECT 落在 .opt-worktrees/<proj>/<wt> 内，.. 上溯只到 .opt-worktrees/<proj>，WT_BASE 算成 .../.opt-worktrees/<proj>/<wt>/../.opt-worktrees/<wt> = .../.opt-worktrees/<proj>/.opt-worktrees/<wt> 双嵌到不存在的空壳目录，cmd init 据此建伪 .opt-worktrees（[[opt-worktree-standing-wt-staleness]] case-363 同源嵌套的 standing-wt 侧缺口）。
action: 单文件改动 scripts/opt-worktree.sh：在 PROJECT=$(cd $PROJECT && pwd) 之后、WT_BASE= 之前插入 case 守卫——case "$PROJECT" in */.opt-worktrees/*) 切出 _real_prefix=${PROJECT%%/.opt-worktrees/*}（.opt-worktrees 前工作区根）+ _rest=${PROJECT#*/.opt-worktrees/}（<proj>/<wt>[/<sub>]）+ _proj_name=${_rest%%/*}（.opt-worktrees 下与 basename(PROJECT) 同名真项目目录），candidate=$_real_prefix/$_proj_name；若 candidate 有 .git 则 PROJECT=candidate 重新锚定真 main checkout，否则 exit 2 大声报错（在 .opt-worktrees 内跑但找不到真 main 是真坏状态，fail-fast）。正常路径（PROJECT 不含 .opt-worktrees）case 不匹配，守卫不触发。两副本（root live scripts/opt-worktree.sh + AS git autonomous-studio/scripts/opt-worktree.sh）同改：Edit root live 后 cp root→AS main wt dirty AS main，经 opt-worktree commit engine:nesting-guard 提交 AS 副本，cmd_commit cp-guard（target fresh=OLD == main HEAD=OLD，cmp 等）放行 cp NEW 入 optimization worktree + commit + main 还原 clean。
worktree: optimization（standing engine worktree，auto/optimization 分支，tip b345be7，路径 .opt-worktrees/autonomous-studio/optimization）
outcome_evidence: (1) 修前 repro：从 standing wt 内 PROJECT=/home/admin/workspace/.opt-worktrees/autonomous-studio/optimization，WT_BASE 算成 /home/admin/workspace/.opt-worktrees/autonomous-studio/optimization/../.opt-worktrees/optimization，ls -d 该路径 'No such file or directory'（双嵌空壳实证）。(2) 修后验证：从 standing wt 内跑 `bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh . list`，PROJECT 经守卫解析为 /home/admin/workspace/autonomous-studio（真 main，ls -d .git OK_REAL_MAIN），list 正确列 opt-housekeeping-1782853292 + optimization 两 worktree 无双嵌。(3) 提交实证：git -C optimization log --oneline -2 显 b345be7 opt(engine:nesting-guard) 父 de1fffa；show --stat 显 1 file changed scripts/opt-worktree.sh。(4) main 安全：git -C autonomous-studio status --porcelain 空。(5) 两副本状态：root live grep case-402=1（守卫在，实跑副本已生效），AS main wt 副本 grep case-402=0（cmd_commit 还原 clean 回 OLD）——预期两副本漂移，merge 后 cp AS→root 同步（[[opt-worktree-root-as-copy-drift]]）。(6) worktree list：main de1fffa / opt-housekeeping-1782853292 ea6671f（case-401 待合）/ optimization b345be7（case-402 fix 待合）。
next_suggestion: 下轮两个待合 worktree 皆三步审计后合入 AS main：(A) opt-housekeeping-1782853292（tip ea6671f，纯 case-401 JSON 30 行，已 git show --stat 证无副作用）`bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh autonomous-studio merge opt-housekeeping-1782853292`。(B) optimization（tip b345be7，1 file scripts/opt-worktree.sh 嵌套守卫）`bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh autonomous-studio merge optimization`——merge 后 standing optimization worktree 会被删+下轮 ensure_main_wt 重建 fresh；merge 后须 cp AS autonomous-studio/scripts/opt-worktree.sh → root live scripts/opt-worktree.sh 同步两副本（[[opt-worktree-root-as-copy-drift]]）。合 (B) 前先 git show --stat b345be7 证仅单文件。两 merge 皆小机械步骤，ride-merge 不产 case 滞后（[[scout-scan-case-record-lag-break]] case-374）。case-id 走 next-case（已返 402，下轮合后扫盘 max+1）。
